This is the weekly visible open thread. Post about anything you want, ask random questions, whatever. ACX has an unofficial subreddit [ https://substack.com/redirect/ad5d989c-1f26-45be-9360-9c93fc0129e4?r=8o54n ], Discord [ https://substack.com/redirect/e48d6936-42ae-47bb-85cc-7b344f2a4324?r=8o54n ], and bulletin board [ https://substack.com/redirect/efb138b6-1a2e-4836-bb4e-77b344a7c19e?r=8o54n ], and in-person meetups around the world [ https://substack.com/redirect/5d3a3a41-b2d8-41ae-ba16-e49afe17a687?r=8o54n ]. 95% of content is free, but for the remaining 5% you can subscribe here [ https://substack.com/redirect/2c16afad-4333-4430-93bf-a0fc3a602cb9?r=8o54n ]. In this week’s news:
1: Reminder that we are still looking for organizers for this year’s Meetups Everywhere [ https://substack.com/redirect/daa44d95-0056-4332-9246-516d8e2f1e65?r=8o54n ], ie volunteer to host an ACX meetup in your city that will get signal-boosted on the blog. We seem to have had unusually few people apply this time around, so if you were on the fence, please sign up [ https://substack.com/redirect/2d80d61c-ceca-4882-84bb-a31982f41a7f?r=8o54n ].
